---
title: B. GitHub access
---

Sign in with the GitHub CLI (`gh`) so your machine can reach the **private**
BigPicture repositories and container images (GHCR).

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #6](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/6).
:::
